## Checklist

- [ ] `rice.toml` is present at the repository root
- [ ] All required fields are filled (`id`, `name`, `author`, `description`, `wm`, `theme`, `repo_url`)
- [ ] `description` is between 20 and 300 characters
- [ ] `repo_url` is a valid `https://github.com/` URL
- [ ] `id` contains only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
- [ ] Repository is public
- [ ] At least one screenshot is included (optional but recommended)
- [ ] `pipeline.toml` scripts are safe and idempotent (if included)
